LABEL: Screened Supplemental HRSN Disabilities Overall Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) supplemental health related social need (HRSN) disabilities composite indicator. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_DSBLTS_OVRL_SCRNG_IND

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for disabilities need
